case_title: TONG CONNIE VS CABLE CAR et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY TONG CONNIE AS TO DEFENDANT CABLE CAR CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-28-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CABLE CAR
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-28-1992, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO OCT-15-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TONG CONNIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,008.00, CITY FAILED TO PROVIDE TESTING OF DRIVER; WITNESSES DID NOT OBSERVE COLLISION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CABLE CAR CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
